commit_scope: Project Form graph-node envelopes into an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped ideas read body.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/ideas-graph-projection.fk form-stdlib/tests/ideas-graph-projection-band.fk

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_graph_projection_form.py tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
local_validation.summary: form/form-stdlib/ideas-graph-projection.fk now reads idea nodes through graph-node-port and emits an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped JSON body with required IdeaWithScore defaults, summary counts, and pagination. The projection band returned 11111 across memory and durable file carriers, including file reopen projection. The ideas router gap now names route-manifest binding and live storage as the remaining boundary.

known_limitations.observed: The projection is proven as Form stdlib but is not bound to deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk because that manifest is currently self-contained. Follow-up: ideas-native-graph-projection-route.
Required idea read fields are emitted with conservative defaults. Optional property projection remains follow-up: ideas-graph-property-json-projection.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the ideas graph projection commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this Form stdlib projection slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now project graph-node idea records into an IdeaPortfolioResponse-shaped read body through graph-node-port over memory and durable file carriers. Existing public /api/ideas behavior remains unchanged until the proven projection is bound into the production route manifest and live storage carrier.
